title: Triton Ivory 4 Electric Shower 9.5kW (Caselona 3, Eclipse, Excite Plus, T80gsi)
features: Rub clean shower head – Single spray pattern
Left and right hand side water entry points
Will replace Triton Caselona 3, T80gsi, Aquablast, Riya, Cherish, Avena, Eclipse, Serres, Sileni, Tenero, Thiago, Exite Plus
Two year parts and labour guarantee (UK only)
description: This popular Ivory 4 model offers a fantastic value for money electric shower option. Separate flow and temperature control dials provide ease of use and the unit accepts water entry from the left or the right, with left hand cable entry points. Rub clean shower head – Single spray pattern Left and right hand side water entry points Separate temperature and power controls Will replace Triton Caselona 3, T80gsi, Aquablast, Riya, Cherish, Avena, Eclipse, Serres, Sileni, Tenero, Thiago, Exite Plus Two year parts and labour guarantee (UK only)
